title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Quest Alliance Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Quest Alliance Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quest Alliance Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Quest Alliance Capital India:
Quest Alliance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance Capital India!
